credentials.title: User Credentials Override
credentials.description: Secure private credentials override for third-party endpoints, belonging to a specific Firebase User.

userId.description: The UID of the owning Firebase user.

nextgen.description: NextGen / Gemini core override token if set.

openai.description: OpenAI API override token if set.

hpcai.description: HPC AI API override token if set.

nvidia.description: Nvidia API override token if set.

stability.description: Stability AI override token if set.

huggingface.description: Hugging Face override token if set.

news.description: GNews API override token if set.

search.description: Serper search API override token if set.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the credentials package was last synchronized.

/users/{userId}/private/credentials.description: Private sensitive third-party override keys belonging strictly to the specified userId.
